Coached by [[Danny Ward (rugby league)|Danny Ward]], the [[London Broncos]] competed in the [[2020 RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]] and the [[2020 Challenge Cup]]. It was their fifth season at the [[Trailfinders Sports Ground]] in [[West Ealing, London]]. The season was abandoned after five rounds, however the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] had already been eliminated from the [[Challenge Cup]] at the 4th round stage. ==2020 standings== {{2020 RFL
